title: Hearty Irish Stew
description: A comforting, slow-cooked stew perfect for a chilly evening. The addition of xtra virgin olive oil and a hint of bitter greens elevate this classic dish.
instructions: Heat the xtra virgin olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped carrots and celery and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Add the irish stew, diced tomatoes, potatoes, salt, and enough water to cover the ingredients.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 30 minutes.
Stir in the chopped parsley and serve hot.
Garnish with additional parsley, if desired.
